festivals.name: Ganga Dussehra
festivals.description: Celebrates the descent of Goddess Ganga to Earth. Grand Ganga Aarti with thousands of diyas (lamps) floated on the river.
festivals.significance: Bathing in Ganga on this day is believed to wash away sins.

festivals.name: Maha Shivaratri
festivals.description: The Great Night of Shiva. Devotees observe fasting and night-long vigil.
festivals.significance: Celebrates Lord Shiva's cosmic dance and marriage to Parvati.

festivals.name: Kumbh Mela (Haridwar)
festivals.description: World's largest religious gathering. Millions take holy dip at Ganga.
festivals.significance: Based on Hindu mythology - drops of immortal nectar fell at four locations.

festivals.name: Nanda Devi Raj Jat
festivals.description: Ancient pilgrimage to honor Goddess Nanda Devi. 280 km trek over 19 days.
festivals.significance: UNESCO Intangible Cultural Heritage. Tradition spans over 1,000 years.

upcoming_local_events.description: Cultural programs, local handicraft exhibition, food festival
World-renowned yoga teachers, meditation workshops, Ganga Aarti
